items.description: A short-sleeved blouse with puffed sleeves, a gathered or smocked neckline with a small opening, and a loose fit, worn as an undershirt.

A long, loose-fitting pinafore or sundress featuring a plaid pattern with thin black spaghetti straps and a gathered bodice that flows into an A-line skirt. The pattern consists of dark blue/purple and maroon/burgundy squares with thinner light blue/purple intersecting lines.
Flat, closed-toe Mary Jane style shoes with a single strap over the instep, featuring an all-over perforated design on the upper.
A small crossbody bag with a gold chain strap and a decorative tassel hanging from the side.
A smartwatch with a metallic link band.
